arabic:
وَبِإِسْنَادِهِ قَالَ ‏
"‏ لاَ يَبُولَنَّ أَحَدُكُمْ فِي الْمَاءِ الدَّائِمِ الَّذِي لاَ يَجْرِي، ثُمَّ يَغْتَسِلُ فِيهِ ‏"‏‏.‏

english.narrator: The same narrator said that the Prophet (ﷺ) had said:
english.text: "You should not pass urine in stagnant water which is not flowing then (you may need to) wash in it."
